requirement_topic.en: CE Marking — NOT Required for General Furniture
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志——一般家具无需CE标志
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌——一般家具無需CE標誌

summary.en: IMPORTANT FLAG — FURNITURE DOES NOT REQUIRE CE MARKING: General domestic furniture (beds, sofas, chairs, tables, cabinets, wardrobes, shelving) has no applicable EU CE Directive or Regulation requiring CE marking. CE marking is required only for products covered by specific EU harmonisation legislation (e.g., Low Voltage Directive for electrical products, Machinery Regulation for machinery, Toy Safety Directive for toys). Furniture with no electrical, mechanical-machinery, or toy-scope components falls outside the CE marking framework. Applying CE marking to furniture without a legal basis is a misuse of CE marking and is prohibited under EU law. The applicable general safety framework is GPSR (EU) 2023/988.
summary.zh: 重要提示——家具无需CE标志：一般家居家具（床、沙发、椅子、桌子、橱柜、衣柜、置物架）没有适用的欧盟CE指令或法规要求加贴CE标志。CE标志仅适用于受特定欧盟协调立法约束的产品（如低压指令适用于电气产品、机械法规适用于机械设备、玩具安全指令适用于玩具）。不含电气、机械或玩具范围部件的家具不在CE标志框架内。在无法律依据的情况下对家具加贴CE标志属于CE标志的滥用，且在欧盟法律下被禁止。适用的通用安全框架为GPSR (EU) 2023/988。
summary.zht: 重要提示——家具無需CE標誌：一般家居家具（床、沙發、椅子、桌子、櫥櫃、衣櫃、置物架）沒有適用的歐盟CE指令或法規要求加貼CE標誌。CE標誌僅適用於受特定歐盟協調立法約束的產品（如低壓指令適用於電氣產品、機械法規適用於機械設備、玩具安全指令適用於玩具）。不含電氣、機械或玩具範圍部件的家具不在CE標誌框架內。在無法律依據的情況下對家具加貼CE標誌屬於CE標誌的濫用，且在歐盟法律下被禁止。適用的通用安全框架為GPSR (EU) 2023/988。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/988 on General Product Safety (GPSR) — the applicable framework for general furniture (not CE marking)

Regulation (EC) No 765/2008 — setting out the requirements for accreditation and market surveillance relating to the marketing of products (CE marking framework — does not apply to furniture without harmonised technical legislation)

summary.en: China does not require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for furniture exports. CCC applies to specific product categories listed in the CCC catalogue — general furniture (beds, sofas, tables, chairs, cabinets) is not included. Chinese furniture for export is subject to customs declaration and the general export quality supervision framework under SAMR, but no CCC is required. The lack of a CCC requirement for furniture exports mirrors the EU position (no CE required for general furniture), though the underlying safety frameworks differ.
summary.zh: 中国不要求家具出口进行CCC（中国强制认证）。CCC适用于CCC目录中列明的特定产品类别——一般家具（床、沙发、桌子、椅子、橱柜）不在目录内。中国出口家具需进行报关并接受市场监管总局的一般出口质量监管，但无需CCC认证。家具出口无CCC要求，这与欧盟立场相似（一般家具无需CE标志），尽管两者的基本安全框架不同。
summary.zht: 中國不要求家具出口進行CCC（中國強制認證）。CCC適用於CCC目錄中列明的特定產品類別——一般家具（床、沙發、桌子、椅子、櫥櫃）不在目錄內。中國出口家具需進行報關並接受市場監管總局的一般出口質量監管，但無需CCC認證。家具出口無CCC要求，這與歐盟立場相似（一般家具無需CE標誌），儘管兩者的基本安全框架不同。

standards_or_laws: SAMR CCC Catalogue (China Compulsory Certification) — furniture is not listed; no CCC required for furniture export

gap.en: The gap is not CE marking (which does not apply) but rather: (1) GPSR compliance documentation — Chinese exporters must prepare GPSR-compliant safety documentation (internal safety file, product traceability information); (2) EU Responsible Person — required under GPSR Article 16 for non-EU manufacturers selling to EU consumers; (3) avoiding CE misuse — some Chinese exporters incorrectly apply CE marks to furniture; this is a compliance risk. No CE marking is the correct position for general furniture.
gap.zh: 差距不在于CE标志（不适用），而在于：(1)GPSR合规文件——中国出口商须准备符合GPSR的安全文件（内部安全档案、产品可追溯性信息）；(2)欧盟责任人——依据GPSR第16条，向欧盟消费者销售的非欧盟制造商须指定欧盟责任人；(3)避免CE滥用——部分中国出口商错误地在家具上加贴CE标志，构成合规风险。对于一般家具，正确做法是不加贴CE标志。
gap.zht: 差距不在於CE標誌（不適用），而在於：(1)GPSR合規文件——中國出口商須準備符合GPSR的安全文件（內部安全檔案、產品可追溯性資訊）；(2)歐盟責任人——依據GPSR第16條，向歐盟消費者銷售的非歐盟製造商須指定歐盟責任人；(3)避免CE濫用——部分中國出口商錯誤地在家具上加貼CE標誌，構成合規風險。對於一般家具，正確做法是不加貼CE標誌。

mandatory_status.target: CE marking: NOT applicable to general furniture — no CE Directive or Regulation covers general domestic furniture; GPSR (EU) 2023/988 is the applicable mandatory framework
mandatory_status.cn: CCC: NOT required for furniture export; GB 28481-2012 is mandatory for domestic market sales only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — KEY FLAG] General furniture does NOT require CE marking. There is no applicable EU CE Directive or Regulation for general domestic furniture. Applying CE marking to furniture without a legal basis is prohibited. The mandatory framework is GPSR (EU) 2023/988. Chinese CCC is also not required for furniture export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考——重要提示】一般家具无需CE标志。没有适用于一般家居家具的欧盟CE指令或法规。在无法律依据的情况下对家具加贴CE标志被禁止。强制性框架为GPSR (EU) 2023/988。中国CCC亦不要求用于家具出口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考——重要提示】一般家具無需CE標誌。沒有適用於一般家居家具的歐盟CE指令或法規。在無法律依據的情況下對家具加貼CE標誌被禁止。強制性框架為GPSR (EU) 2023/988。中國CCC亦不要求用於家具出口。

requirement_topic.en: EU Responsible Person — GPSR Requirement for Non-EU Manufacturers
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟责任人——GPSR对非欧盟制造商的要求
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟責任人——GPSR對非歐盟製造商的要求

summary.en: Under GPSR (EU) 2023/988 Article 16, economic operators placing products on the EU market must ensure there is a Responsible Person established in the EU. For non-EU manufacturers (including Chinese furniture manufacturers), the Responsible Person may be the importer (if importing into the EU), an EU-established authorised representative, or the fulfillment service provider (for online sales). The Responsible Person must: hold safety documentation; cooperate with market surveillance; take corrective actions; register on the EU Safety Gate portal for serious risks. This obligation applies to all consumer products including furniture.
summary.zh: 依据GPSR (EU) 2023/988第16条，将产品投放欧盟市场的经营者须确保在欧盟境内存在一名责任人。对于非欧盟制造商（包括中国家具制造商），责任人可以是进口商（如将产品进口至欧盟）、欧盟境内授权代表或履约服务提供商（用于网络销售）。责任人须：持有安全文件；配合市场监督；采取纠正措施；在严重风险情形下在欧盟Safety Gate门户进行登记。该义务适用于包括家具在内的所有消费品。
summary.zht: 依據GPSR (EU) 2023/988第16條，將產品投放歐盟市場的經營者須確保在歐盟境內存在一名責任人。對於非歐盟製造商（包括中國家具製造商），責任人可以是進口商（如將產品進口至歐盟）、歐盟境內授權代表或履約服務提供商（用於網絡銷售）。責任人須：持有安全文件；配合市場監督；採取糾正措施；在嚴重風險情形下在歐盟Safety Gate門戶進行登記。該義務適用於包括家具在內的所有消費品。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/988 on General Product Safety (GPSR), Article 16 — Responsible Person
Regulation (EU) 2023/988, Articles 8–13 — Obligations of economic operators

summary.en: China has no equivalent obligation requiring Chinese furniture manufacturers to designate an EU Responsible Person. Under Chinese export regulations, the exporter/manufacturer is responsible for compliance with destination country import requirements, but there is no Chinese legal framework that operationalises the GPSR EU Responsible Person obligation. Chinese manufacturers exporting via B2B importer relationships can rely on the EU importer as the Responsible Person — but direct-to-consumer sales (e.g., via online marketplaces) require the manufacturer or fulfilment provider to be the Responsible Person.
summary.zh: 中国没有要求中国家具制造商指定欧盟责任人的等同义务。根据中国出口法规，出口商/制造商须对遵守目的地国进口要求负责，但中国法律框架未将GPSR欧盟责任人义务具体化。通过B2B进口商关系出口的中国制造商可依赖欧盟进口商担任责任人——但直接面向消费者的销售（如通过在线市场平台）则要求制造商或履约服务提供商担任责任人。
summary.zht: 中國沒有要求中國家具製造商指定歐盟責任人的等同義務。根據中國出口法規，出口商/製造商須對遵守目的地國進口要求負責，但中國法律框架未將GPSR歐盟責任人義務具體化。通過B2B進口商關係出口的中國製造商可依賴歐盟進口商擔任責任人——但直接面向消費者的銷售（如通過在線市場平台）則要求製造商或履約服務提供商擔任責任人。

standards_or_laws: No equivalent Chinese obligation — GPSR EU Responsible Person requirement is an EU-specific market access obligation for non-EU manufacturers

gap.en: Chinese furniture manufacturers selling directly to EU consumers (particularly via e-commerce platforms such as Amazon EU, Wayfair EU, or their own EU-facing website) must designate an EU Responsible Person before placing products on the EU market. This is a new structural gap for direct-to-consumer exporters. B2B exporters selling through EU importers can rely on the importer as Responsible Person, but the supply contract should clearly assign this responsibility.
gap.zh: 直接向欧盟消费者销售的中国家具制造商（尤其是通过亚马逊欧盟站、Wayfair欧盟站或其自有欧盟网站等电商平台）须在将产品投放欧盟市场前指定欧盟责任人。这对直接面向消费者的出口商而言是一个新的结构性差距。通过欧盟进口商进行B2B出口的出口商可依赖进口商担任责任人，但供货合同应明确分配这一责任。
gap.zht: 直接向歐盟消費者銷售的中國家具製造商（尤其是通過亞馬遜歐盟站、Wayfair歐盟站或其自有歐盟網站等電商平台）須在將產品投放歐盟市場前指定歐盟責任人。這對直接面向消費者的出口商而言是一個新的結構性差距。通過歐盟進口商進行B2B出口的出口商可依賴進口商擔任責任人，但供貨合同應明確分配這一責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GPSR Article 16 EU Responsible Person is required for all non-EU manufacturers placing consumer products (including furniture) on the EU market; applies from 13 December 2024
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no Chinese legal obligation to designate an EU Responsible Person

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GPSR Article 16 mandates an EU Responsible Person for non-EU manufacturers. For Chinese furniture manufacturers: B2B exporters can use the EU importer as Responsible Person; direct-to-consumer exporters must designate an EU-established Responsible Person separately. No equivalent Chinese obligation exists.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GPSR第16条要求非欧盟制造商指定欧盟责任人。对于中国家具制造商：B2B出口商可将欧盟进口商作为责任人；直接面向消费者的出口商须另行指定欧盟境内责任人。中国没有等同义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GPSR第16條要求非歐盟製造商指定歐盟責任人。對於中國家具製造商：B2B出口商可將歐盟進口商作為責任人；直接面向消費者的出口商須另行指定歐盟境內責任人。中國沒有等同義務。

requirement_topic.en: EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR) — Due Diligence for Wood Products
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟森林砍伐法规（EUDR）——木材产品尽职调查
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟森林砍伐法規（EUDR）——木材產品盡職調查

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2023/1115 on deforestation-free products (EUDR) requires operators placing certain commodities and derived products on the EU market — including wood and products derived from wood such as furniture (HS codes 94.01, 94.03) — to exercise due diligence to ensure they are deforestation-free and produced in compliance with the laws of the country of production. Operators must collect geolocation coordinates for the land where commodities were produced, conduct a risk assessment, and submit a due diligence statement before placing products on the market. Regulation (EU) 2025/2650 is the current delay instrument, delaying application to 30 December 2026 for large and medium operators and 30 June 2027 for micro and small operators. The earlier EU Timber Regulation (EUTR, Regulation (EU) No 995/2010) is superseded by EUDR for covered wood products.
summary.zh: 欧盟森林砍伐法规(EU) 2023/1115（EUDR）要求将特定商品及衍生产品（包括木材及木材衍生产品如家具，HS编码94.01、94.03）投放欧盟市场的经营者进行尽职调查，确保产品不来自毁林区域且按照生产国法律生产。经营者须收集商品生产土地的地理坐标，进行风险评估，并在投放产品前提交尽职调查声明。法规(EU) 2025/2650是当前延期文件，将适用日期推迟至大型和中型经营者2026年12月30日、微型和小型经营者2027年6月30日。较早的《欧盟木材法规》（EUTR，法规(EU) No 995/2010）对所涵盖木材产品已被EUDR取代。
summary.zht: 歐盟森林砍伐法規(EU) 2023/1115（EUDR）要求將特定商品及衍生產品（包括木材及木材衍生產品如家具，HS編碼94.01、94.03）投放歐盟市場的經營者進行盡職調查，確保產品不來自毀林區域且按照生產國法律生產。經營者須收集商品生產土地的地理座標，進行風險評估，並在投放產品前提交盡職調查聲明。法規(EU) 2025/2650是當前延期文件，將適用日期推遲至大型和中型經營者2026年12月30日、微型和小型經營者2027年6月30日。較早的《歐盟木材法規》（EUTR，法規(EU) No 995/2010）對所涵蓋木材產品已被EUDR取代。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1115 on the making available on the Union market and the export from the Union of certain commodities and products associated with deforestation and forest degradation (EUDR)

summary.en: China does not have a legal framework equivalent to the EUDR requiring deforestation due diligence for wood products. China's Forestry Law and related regulations govern domestic timber harvesting and forest management, but do not impose supply-chain traceability obligations equivalent to EUDR on Chinese manufacturers or exporters. Chinese furniture exporters typically do not collect geolocation data for timber origins or maintain EUDR-style due diligence systems, creating a significant new documentation gap for EU market access.
summary.zh: 中国没有与EUDR要求木材产品毁林尽职调查相当的法律框架。中国《森林法》及相关法规管辖国内木材采伐和森林管理，但不对中国制造商或出口商施加与EUDR等同的供应链可追溯性义务。中国家具出口商通常不收集木材来源的地理坐标，也不维护EUDR式尽职调查系统，这为欧盟市场准入创造了重大的新文件差距。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與EUDR要求木材產品毀林盡職調查相當的法律框架。中國《森林法》及相關法規管轄國內木材採伐和森林管理，但不對中國製造商或出口商施加與EUDR等同的供應鏈可追溯性義務。中國家具出口商通常不收集木材來源的地理座標，也不維護EUDR式盡職調查系統，這為歐盟市場准入創造了重大的新文件差距。

standards_or_laws: China Forestry Law (2019 revision) — governs domestic forest management; no EUDR-equivalent supply chain due diligence obligation

gap.en: EUDR is a significant new compliance burden for Chinese wood furniture exporters. Key gaps: (1) geolocation traceability — Chinese manufacturers must be able to provide GPS coordinates for the land where timber was harvested; (2) risk assessment and due diligence statement — must be filed with EU customs authorities before each import; (3) supply chain transparency — Chinese furniture supply chains often involve multiple tiers of timber sourcing without documented geolocation. EUDR applies to wood furniture (HS 9401, 9403) — the overwhelming majority of Chinese furniture exports to the EU are covered. Exporters should verify current application date as the regulation has been subject to delays.
gap.zh: EUDR对中国木家具出口商而言是重大的新合规负担。主要差距：(1)地理坐标可追溯性——中国制造商须能够提供木材采伐地块的GPS坐标；(2)风险评估和尽职调查声明——每次进口前须向欧盟海关机构提交；(3)供应链透明度——中国家具供应链通常涉及多层木材采购，缺乏有记录的地理坐标信息。EUDR适用于木家具（HS 9401、9403）——中国对欧盟家具出口的绝大多数在涵盖范围内。出口商应核实当前适用日期，因该法规已经历多次推迟。
gap.zht: EUDR對中國木家具出口商而言是重大的新合規負擔。主要差距：(1)地理座標可追溯性——中國製造商須能夠提供木材採伐地塊的GPS座標；(2)風險評估和盡職調查聲明——每次進口前須向歐盟海關機構提交；(3)供應鏈透明度——中國家具供應鏈通常涉及多層木材採購，缺乏有記錄的地理座標資訊。EUDR適用於木家具（HS 9401、9403）——中國對歐盟家具出口的絕大多數在涵蓋範圍內。出口商應核實當前適用日期，因該法規已經歷多次推遲。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EUDR (EU) 2023/1115 applies to wood furniture (HS 9401, 9403); Regulation (EU) 2025/2650 delays application to 30 December 2026 for large and medium operators and 30 June 2027 for micro and small operators
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China has no EUDR-equivalent due diligence obligation for timber supply chains in furniture exports

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EUDR (EU) 2023/1115 requires deforestation due diligence and geolocation traceability for wood furniture exported to the EU. Regulation (EU) 2025/2650 delays application to 30 December 2026 for large and medium operators and 30 June 2027 for micro and small operators. Chinese furniture supply chains typically lack EUDR-compliant geolocation documentation. This is a major new compliance gap with no Chinese law equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EUDR (EU) 2023/1115要求对出口至欧盟的木家具进行毁林尽职调查和地理坐标可追溯性核查。法规(EU) 2025/2650将适用日期推迟至大型和中型经营者2026年12月30日、微型和小型经营者2027年6月30日。中国家具供应链通常缺乏符合EUDR的地理坐标文件。这是一个重大的新合规差距，中国法律中没有等同要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EUDR (EU) 2023/1115要求對出口至歐盟的木家具進行毀林盡職調查和地理座標可追溯性核查。法規(EU) 2025/2650將適用日期推遲至大型和中型經營者2026年12月30日、微型和小型經營者2027年6月30日。中國家具供應鏈通常缺乏符合EUDR的地理座標文件。這是一個重大的新合規差距，中國法律中沒有等同要求。
